---
name: Performance report
about: Report frame pacing, CPU/GPU cost, memory, stutter, or regression issues.
title: ""
labels: performance
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Use this for stutter, regressions, memory growth, GPU bottlenecks, CPU bottlenecks, frame pacing issues, or resource churn.
For a visual or interaction correctness issue without a clear performance angle, use the bug report template.
-->

**Description**
<!-- Describe the performance problem in one or two paragraphs. Include whether it is CPU, GPU, memory, frame pacing, or unknown if you know. -->


**Workload / repro steps**
<!-- Describe the world, scene, view, or action that causes the problem. Include enough detail for someone else to reproduce or approximate it. -->

1.
2.
3.

**Expected vs observed performance**
<!-- Clearly describe the target or baseline behavior, and what Renderide does instead. -->

Expected:

Observed:

**Extra materials**
<!-- Tracy captures, GPU captures, HUD screenshots, videos, pass timing logs, or small repro assets can go here. -->


**Platform**
<!-- The renderer log normally includes platform details. Add anything missing, such as OS, GPU, driver, headset/runtime, launch mode, or last known good build. -->
